Test Description: Enables posedge interrupt for GPIO[8..39], configures pins as inputs, enables group interrupt, then sequentially generates single rising edges on each pad and waits for ISR; ISR verifies group status, clears per-pin raw, validates group clear, clears sysreg/GIC, and re-enables group.
Remarks: Uses volatile int_pend for ISR handshake; masks group during ISR to avoid reentry; uses external pad driver at 0xA0243ffc for edge generation.
Test Steps / Procedure: Entry: test_case(); 1) Optionally enable GIC IRQ 87/88 depending on GPIO0/GPIO1 macros. 2) WRITE sysreg enable: write_reg(MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1, LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1_GPIO{0|1}_INTR). 3) For i=0..31: WRITE per-pin posedge enable: write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8 + (i*4), 0x00020000) (peie=1). 4) wait_on(10). 5) Configure IO_CTRL groups for input (doe=1): WRITE MIZAR_GPIO_GPIO_IO_CTRL_GROUP1..4 = 0x000000FF. 6) wait_on(10). 7) Enable group interrupt: WRITE MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_EN1 = 0xFFFFFFFF. 8) For i=0..31: WRITE 0xA0243ffc = 0x00000000; wait_on(10); SET int_pend=1; WRITE 0xA0243ffc = 0xFFFFFFFF (generate posedge); Poll with timeout: while(int_pend==1 && --timeout>0) wait_on(10); if timeout==0 { printf timeout; test_err++; break; } Then drive low again and wait_on(10). 9) finish(test_err). ISR: Default_IRQHandler(): 10) wr_val = (1<<i); SET int_pend=0. 11) READ rdata_grp = read_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1). 12) MASK group during service: WRITE MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_EN1 = 0x00000000. 13) CHECK: if ((rdata_grp & 0xFFFFFFFF) != 0) success log else error and test_err++. 14) CLEAR per-pin raw: for j=0..31 WRITE MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8 + (j*4) = 0x00010000 (iclr=1). 15) wait_on(2). 16) VERIFY group clear: READ rdata_grp; if (rdata_grp == 0x0) success else error and test_err++. 17) CLEAR sysreg RAW_STCR1 for GPIO0/GPIO1 and verify readback clears; increment test_err if not cleared. 18) RE-ENABLE group: WRITE MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_EN1 = 0xFFFFFFFF. 19) Clear GIC IRQ with GIC_ClearIRQ(87/88).
Validation / Acceptance Criteria: - Wait-loop exit: PASS if ISR clears int_pend before timeout; FAIL if timeout==0 leading to error print and test_err++. - Group interrupt raised: PASS if (read_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1) & 0xFFFFFFFF) != 0 inside ISR; else error and test_err++. - Group clear: PASS if after clearing per-pin iclr and wait, read_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1) == 0x0; else error and test_err++. - Sysreg raw clear: PASS if after writing RAW_STCR1, subsequent read shows the corresponding bit cleared; else increments test_err. - Final PASS criterion: finish(test_err) with test_err==0.
